name: Aidp.store
description: AIDP is a decentralized AI and DePIN marketplace built on Solana that connects AI developers, businesses, and researchers with distributed GPU compute resources. The platform enables users to access high-performance computing for AI model training, inference, and deployment without relying on centralized cloud providers. By leveraging underutilized GPUs contributed by independent providers, AIDP aims to reduce costs, improve scalability, and increase accessibility to AI infrastructure. The AIDP token is used for payments for compute services, incentives for GPU providers, and ecosystem participation, aligning resource supply with real usage demand through a decentralized, market-driven model.
